title: SwordBlock
description: We Are Bringing 1.8 Sword Blocking Visuals to 1.21
body:
We Are Bringing 1.8 Sword Blocking Visuals to 1.21

- Works with any **ANIMATION** mods (e.g., odin, nofrills)
- Works with any **TEXTURE** packs 
- Added Hypixel Compatibility
- Added Arm Rotation on Third Person View

Type **/swordblock on/off** to toggle.

Note: This mod is purely visual and does not add actual sword blocking mechanics (damage reduction). It is 100% client-side and safe for use on servers like Hypixel.
